bipul sinha.background: Co-founder & CEO of Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK). IIT Kharagpur engineer; before founding Rubrik in 2014 he was a Partner at Lightspeed Venture Partners, where he backed Nutanix. Earlier roles at Oracle. Took Rubrik public in April 2024.
trivia: Wrote the first Nutanix cheque while a VC at Lightspeed
Named Rubrik after the Rubik's cube — order out of chaos
Frequent commentator on cyber-resilience in the age of AI
bipul sinha.contact_pathway: Via Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) investor relations / board; LinkedIn. No personal contact stored — enrich via licensed provider.
good_to_knows: Former VC — fluent in fund structures and co-investment
Post-IPO lock-up expired Oct-2024 — shares now sellable

news.title: Rubrik files to go public as IPO market thaws (CNBC)
Rubrik shares climb ~20% in public debut (TechCrunch)

bipul sinha.family_office: None publicly disclosed — likely personal/single-family vehicle (verify)
bipul sinha.openness_to_meet: High (est.) — ex-VC, fresh post-IPO liquidity, well-networked

arvind jain.background: Founder & CEO of Glean (AI enterprise search) and co-founder of Rubrik. Former Distinguished Engineer at Google, where he worked on core search infrastructure. Co-founded Rubrik in 2014, then started Glean in 2019.
trivia: Holds a 'double' liquidity profile: ~7% Rubrik stake (now public) plus Glean equity
Glean reached multi-billion-dollar valuations in 2025 mega-rounds
funds_affiliations: Glean backers: Kleiner Perkins, Lightspeed, Sequoia, General Catalyst, Coatue
arvind jain.contact_pathway: Via Glean (private) exec office or Rubrik board network; LinkedIn. Enrich contact via licensed provider.
good_to_knows: Serial founder — two high-value vehicles at once

arvind nithrakashyap.background: Co-founder & CTO of Rubrik (~6.7% pre-IPO stake). Engineering leadership background prior to Rubrik (verify specifics).
trivia: One of the largest individual Rubrik shareholders among the founding team
arvind nithrakashyap.contact_pathway: Via Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) investor relations / exec office; enrich via licensed provider.

jitendra mohan.background: Co-founder & CEO of Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB), an AI-connectivity semiconductor company that IPO'd in March 2024 at a ~$5.5B valuation. Previously ran the high-speed-interface business at Texas Instruments.
trivia: Astera's stock re-rated sharply after IPO, multiplying founder paper wealth
Built the company out of a Texas Instruments product group
jitendra mohan.contact_pathway: Via Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB) investor relations; LinkedIn. Enrich via licensed provider.

sanjay gajendra.background: Co-founder, President & COO of Astera Labs; ex-Texas Instruments. Helped scale Astera from startup to a top AI-connectivity IPO of 2024.
trivia: Operating partner to CEO Jitendra Mohan since the TI days
sanjay gajendra.contact_pathway: Via Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB) investor relations; enrich via licensed provider.

sridhar ramaswamy.background: CEO of Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW) since Feb 2024. Founded search startup Neeva (acquired by Snowflake in 2023). Former SVP of Ads at Google; spent time as a venture partner at Greylock.
trivia: Ran Google's multi-billion-dollar ads business before founding Neeva
Stepped from VC (Greylock) into the Snowflake CEO seat via the Neeva acquisition
sridhar ramaswamy.contact_pathway: Via Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW) investor relations / exec office; LinkedIn. Enrich via licensed provider.
good_to_knows: Significant RSU package as Snowflake CEO

dev ittycheria.background: President & CEO of MongoDB (NASDAQ: MDB). Founded BladeLogic (sold to BMC Software). Has served as a venture partner (General Catalyst / OpenView). Long-tenured public-company CEO with recurring stock sales.
trivia: Regular Form 4 sales = recurring realised liquidity
dev ittycheria.contact_pathway: Via MongoDB (NASDAQ: MDB) investor relations; LinkedIn. Enrich via licensed provider.

peyush bansal.background: Co-founder & CEO of Lenskart (born 26 Apr 1985). Worked at Microsoft in the US before returning to India to build Lenskart into a multinational eyewear retailer; led its 2025 IPO (raised ~Rs 7,200 crore). Well known as a judge on Shark Tank India.
trivia: High public profile via Shark Tank India — unusually reachable
funds_affiliations: Active angel investor (via Shark Tank India)
peyush bansal.contact_pathway: Via Lenskart corporate office; public speaking bureau; LinkedIn. Enrich via licensed provider.
investment_preferences: Early-stage Indian consumer & D2C (active via Shark Tank India)
peyush bansal.openness_to_meet: High (est.) — highly public, active angel investor
